title: helichrysum xerochrysum
intro: Helichrysum xerochrysum, also known as the small yellow-headed helichrysum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to Australia and has been used for its medicinal and health benefits for centuries. Helichrysum xerochrysum contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or tea, and is often used to treat digestive issues, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
